Example_EN: Please leave your key at hotel reception.
Example_CN: 请把钥匙留在酒店前台。

Example_EN: She received public recognition for her charity work.
Example_CN: 她因慈善工作获得公众认可。

Example_EN: I followed her strong recommendation and booked early.
Example_CN: 我听从她的强烈推荐并提早就订了。

Example_EN: Please make a short audio recording of your speech.
Example_CN: 请给演讲录一小段音频。

Example_EN: She hopes to recover from the flu by Monday.
Example_CN: 她希望周一前从流感中康复。

Example_EN: The patient made a full recovery after surgery.
Example_CN: 病人手术后完全康复。

Example_EN: The park offers outdoor recreation for families.
Example_CN: 公园为家庭提供户外休闲。

Example_EN: The shop needs to recruit staff for the busy season.
Example_CN: 商店需要为旺季招聘员工。

Example_EN: There is a price reduction on winter coats this week.
Example_CN: 本周冬衣降价。

Example_EN: Please refer to page ten for more examples.
Example_CN: 更多例子请参见第十页。

Example_EN: Keep this email for future reference.
Example_CN: 请保留这封邮件以备日后参考。

Example_EN: Take time to reflect on what you have learned.
Example_CN: 花时间反思你所学到的。

Example_EN: On reflection, we should have left earlier.
Example_CN: 反思之后，我们本该更早出发。

Example_EN: The government announced education reform last year.
Example_CN: 政府去年宣布教育改革。

Example_EN: Walkers took refuge from the storm in a hut.
Example_CN: 徒步者在小屋里躲避风暴。

Example_EN: Charities provide food for refugee families.
Example_CN: 慈善机构为难民家庭提供食物。

Example_EN: Please write with regard to your application status.
Example_CN: 请就你的申请状态写信询问。

Example_EN: I am writing regarding your order last week.
Example_CN: 我写信是关于你上周的订单。

Example_EN: The company opened a regional office in Leeds.
Example_CN: 公司在利兹开设了地区办事处。

Example_EN: Please register for the course before Friday.
Example_CN: 请周五前报名该课程。

Example_EN: Online registration for the race opens tomorrow.
Example_CN: 比赛在线报名明天开放。

Example_EN: I regret not learning to swim as a child.
Example_CN: 我后悔小时候没学会游泳。

Example_EN: Try to exercise regularly at least three times a week.
Example_CN: 尽量每周至少定期锻炼三次。

Example_EN: New rules regulate how schools use student data.
Example_CN: 新规约束学校如何使用学生数据。

Example_EN: Follow every safety regulation in the science lab.
Example_CN: 请遵守科学实验室每条安全规定。

Example_EN: Teachers reinforce learning with short weekly quizzes.
Example_CN: 老师用每周小测验巩固学习。

Collocation: reject an offer;reject an idea;flatly reject
Example_EN: The council may reject the building plan.
Example_CN: 市政会可能否决建楼计划。

Example_EN: Can you relate this story to your own life?
Example_CN: 你能把这个故事联系到自己的生活吗？

Example_EN: Stress is often related to lack of sleep.
Example_CN: 压力常与睡眠不足相关。

Example_EN: What is your relation to the applicant?
Example_CN: 你与申请人是什么关系？

Example_EN: She visited a close relative in Scotland.
Example_CN: 她探望了苏格兰的近亲。

Example_EN: The test was relatively easy for most students.
Example_CN: 对多数学生来说测验相对容易。

Example_EN: We felt relaxed after a quiet weekend by the sea.
Example_CN: 在海边安静度过周末后我们感到放松。

Example_EN: A hot bath after work is really relaxing.
Example_CN: 下班后洗热水澡真的很放松。

Example_EN: The studio will release a new film in December.
Example_CN: 制片厂十二月将发行新电影。

Example_EN: Please bring relevant experience to the interview.
Example_CN: 请把相关经验带到面试中。

Example_EN: A reliable friend keeps secrets carefully.
Example_CN: 可靠的朋友会谨慎保守秘密。

Collocation: sense of relief;disaster relief;to my relief
Example_EN: To my relief, the keys were still in my bag.
Example_CN: 令我宽慰的是，钥匙还在包里。

Example_EN: People of different religious beliefs live here peacefully.
Example_CN: 不同宗教信仰的人在这里和平共处。

Example_EN: You can rely on public transport in this city.
Example_CN: 在这个城市你可以依赖公共交通。

Example_EN: Please use the remaining time to check your answers.
Example_CN: 请用剩余时间检查答案。

Example_EN: She made a kind remark about his painting.
Example_CN: 她对他的画作说了句友善的话。

Example_EN: Her recovery after surgery was truly remarkable.
Example_CN: 她手术后的恢复确实惊人。

Example_EN: They spent a week in a remote mountain village.
Example_CN: 他们在偏远山村待了一周。

Example_EN: The removal of old carpets took all morning.
Example_CN: 搬走旧地毯花了整个上午。

Example_EN: We booked a car rental for the weekend trip.
Example_CN: 我们为周末旅行预订了租车。

Example_EN: After repeated warnings, he finally changed seats.
Example_CN: 多次警告后，他终于换了座位。

Example_EN: She will represent her school at the debate final.
Example_CN: 她将代表学校参加辩论决赛。

Example_EN: Everyone deserves fair representation in court.
Example_CN: 每个人在法庭上都应有公正代理。

Example_EN: Please speak to a sales representative at the desk.
Example_CN: 请到柜台找销售代表谈话。

Example_EN: The café has a good reputation for fresh coffee.
Example_CN: 这家咖啡馆因新鲜咖啡口碑很好。

Example_EN: Please make a request in writing if you need leave.
Example_CN: 如需请假请书面提出申请。

Example_EN: This job will require patience and clear communication.
Example_CN: 这份工作需要耐心和清晰沟通。

Example_EN: A passport is a basic requirement for overseas travel.
Example_CN: 护照是出国旅行的基本要求。

Collocation: rescue team;rescue from;come to the rescue
Example_EN: A rescue team reached the climbers before dark.
Example_CN: 救援队天黑前抵达攀登者身边。

Example_EN: A medical researcher explained the new treatment.
Example_CN: 一位医学研究者解释了新疗法。

Collocation: make a reservation;hotel reservation;have a reservation
Example_EN: Do you have a reservation under the name Brown?
Example_CN: 您是否以布朗的名字预订了？

Example_EN: Please reserve a table for four at seven o'clock.
Example_CN: 请预订七点四人桌。

Example_EN: Local residents opposed the new nightclub plan.
Example_CN: 当地居民反对新建夜总会的计划。

Example_EN: She decided to resign from her job next month.
Example_CN: 她决定下月辞去工作。

Example_EN: Try to resist the pressure to finish too quickly.
Example_CN: 尽量抵制过快完成的压力。

Example_EN: The new plan may meet resistance from staff.
Example_CN: 新计划可能遭到员工抵制。

Collocation: New Year resolution;pass a resolution;show resolution
Example_EN: Her New Year resolution is to read more books.
Example_CN: 她的新年决心是多读书。

Example_EN: Talking calmly helped them resolve the argument.
Example_CN: 冷静交谈帮助他们解决了争论。

Example_EN: They spent a week at a quiet seaside resort.
Example_CN: 他们在安静的海滨度假村待了一周。

Example_EN: Water is a precious natural resource in dry areas.
Example_CN: 水在干旱地区是珍贵自然资源。

Example_EN: Players returned to their respective teams after the match.
Example_CN: 比赛后球员回到各自队伍。

Collocation: A and B respectively;finish respectively;aged respectively
Example_EN: Tom and Anna finished first and second respectively.
Example_CN: 汤姆和安娜分别获得第一和第二。

Example_EN: Please respond to this email before Friday.
Example_CN: 请周五前回复这封邮件。

Example_EN: We received a quick response from the customer team.
Example_CN: 我们很快收到客户团队的回复。

Example_EN: Adults must take responsibility for their choices.
Example_CN: 成年人必须为自己的选择负责。

Example_EN: Who is responsible for locking the classroom door?
Example_CN: 谁负责锁教室门？

Example_EN: The old theatre is under restoration this year.
Example_CN: 这座旧剧院今年正在修缮。

Example_EN: Workers hope to restore the old bridge by summer.
Example_CN: 工人们希望夏天前修复旧桥。

Example_EN: The park will restrict access during road repairs.
Example_CN: 道路维修期间公园将限制进入。

Example_EN: Travel restrictions made holidays harder last year.
Example_CN: 去年旅行限制让假期更难安排。

Example_EN: She works in a busy retail store at weekends.
Example_CN: 她周末在一家繁忙零售店工作。

Example_EN: Good managers know how to retain skilled staff.
Example_CN: 好的管理者知道如何留住熟练员工。

Example_EN: He plans to retire from teaching next year.
Example_CN: 他计划明年从教职退休。

Example_EN: A retired teacher volunteers at the local library.
Example_CN: 一位退休教师在本地图书馆做志愿者。

Example_EN: They are saving carefully for a comfortable retirement.
Example_CN: 他们认真存钱以求舒适退休生活。

Example_EN: The investigation may reveal the true cause.
Example_CN: 调查或许会揭示真实原因。

Example_EN: Ticket sales provide most of the theatre's revenue.
Example_CN: 售票收入构成剧院大部分营收。

Example_EN: Please read the list in reverse order.
Example_CN: 请按倒序读这份名单。

Example_EN: Please review your notes before the oral test.
Example_CN: 口试前请复习笔记。

Collocation: revise for exams;revise a draft;revise carefully
Example_EN: Students revise for exams in the library every night.
Example_CN: 学生每晚在图书馆备考复习。
MemoryTip: 英式 revise：复习；也指修改。

Example_EN: Last-minute revision is less effective than weekly study.
Example_CN: 临时抱佛脚不如每周学习有效。

Example_EN: The internet created a revolution in how we learn.
Example_CN: 互联网引发了学习方式的革命。

Example_EN: Hard work often brings its own reward.
Example_CN: 努力工作常自有回报。

Example_EN: Dancers need a strong sense of rhythm.
Example_CN: 舞者需要很强的节奏感。

Example_EN: Please get rid of the old newspapers in the hall.
Example_CN: 请处理掉大厅里的旧报纸。

Example_EN: A skilled bike rider stopped for the red light.
Example_CN: 技术熟练的骑手遇红灯停下。

Example_EN: Walkers followed the mountain ridge until sunset.
Example_CN: 徒步者沿山脊走到日落。

Example_EN: Paying fifty pounds for a sandwich is ridiculous.
Example_CN: 一个三明治要五十英镑太荒唐了。

Example_EN: The two schools have been rival teams for years.
Example_CN: 这两所学校多年来一直是对手球队。

Example_EN: Thieves tried to rob a bank in the city centre.
Example_CN: 小偷试图抢劫市中心一家银行。

Example_EN: Police investigated an armed robbery near the station.
Example_CN: 警方调查了车站附近的一起持械抢劫。

Example_EN: An industrial robot packs boxes in the factory.
Example_CN: 工业机器人在工厂装箱。

Example_EN: A space rocket lifted off from the coastal base.
Example_CN: 一枚太空火箭从沿海基地升空。

Example_EN: He packed a fishing rod for the weekend by the lake.
Example_CN: 他为湖边周末带上了钓鱼竿。
